en: Thanks, Jimbo. Why don't you go ahead and give me and Mike here a little privacy?
ko: 고마워, 짐보. 나랑 마이크 좀 둘이 있게 해줄래?

en: What do you want, Gallo? That's a stupid question after what you pulled at my parole hearing.
ko: 뭘 원하는 거야, 갈로? 내 가석방 심리에서 저지른 짓 보면 멍청한 질문이지

en: You didn't deserve to get out. Neither did you. Now you're not going to.
ko: 넌 나갈 자격이 없었어. 너도 마찬가지야. 이제 넌 못 나가

en: What, you're going to kill me in the cell? There are guards out there.
ko: 뭐, 독방에서 날 죽일 거야? 밖에 교도관이 있어

en: Just doesn't sink in for you, does it? Those guards out there work for me.
ko: 감이 안 오나 보지? 밖에 있는 교도관들은 내 사람이야

en: See, Mike, I wasn't going to let what happened last time happen this time.
ko: 있잖아, 마이크, 이번에는 지난번 같은 일이 일어나게 둘 생각 없었어

en: No one's going to come run helping you at the last second because they're all locked up tight in their bunks.
ko: 마지막 순간에 달려와서 도와줄 사람은 없어, 다 침상에 단단히 갇혀 있으니까

en: An irony of ironies, because of some prisoner's rights lawsuit way back when.
ko: 아이러니 중의 아이러니지, 예전에 수감자 인권 소송 덕분에

en: There are no cameras in cells. Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait, wait. No, time for waiting is done.
ko: 독방에는 카메라가 없어. 잠깐, 잠깐, 잠깐. 아니, 기다리는 건 끝났어

en: No, no, no, no, no, no, I meant, don't you want to hear about the camera that's in here?
ko: 아니, 아니, 내 말은, 여기 있는 카메라 얘기 안 듣고 싶어?

en: Smile, you son of a bitch. No!
ko: 웃어, 이 개자식아. 안 돼!

en: You did not keep yourself in here just to do this. Oh, yeah, Frank, I did.
ko: 이것 때문에 여기 남은 건 아니겠지. 맞아, 프랭크, 그래서 남았어

en: And now all those guards that aren't in your pocket, they're watching this right now.
ko: 그리고 지금 네 편이 아닌 교도관들이 다 지켜보고 있어

en: And it's 60 feet from that guard station to this cell.
ko: 그리고 교도관실에서 이 독방까지 18미터야

en: So if I calculated correctly, they've got Jimbo in cuffs,
ko: 내 계산이 맞으면 짐보는 수갑 찼을 거고

en: and they're going to be opening that door right now.
ko: 지금 그 문을 열고 있을 거야

en: Drop that knife and step back, Gowell. You piece of shit.
ko: 칼 내려놓고 뒤로 물러서, 고웰. 이 쓰레기 같은 놈

en: Doesn't change anything. Yeah, yeah, yeah, we'll see about that.
ko: 아무것도 안 바뀌어. 그래, 그래, 두고 보자

en: Oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh,
Spending his life living through regret.
She never realized what's important.
Did it work? It worked.
ko: 됐어? 됐어

en: We did it. We did.
ko: 해냈어. 해냈지

en: Come on, let's get out of here. Oh, one more thing.
ko: 자, 여기서 나가자. 아, 한 가지 더

en: Someone couldn't wait for you to get home.
ko: 누가 네가 집에 올 때까지 못 기다리겠대

en: Would you bare, would you bare my love?
Would you bare, would you bare my love?
Would you bare, would you bare my love?
Would you bare, would you bare my love?
